atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline any existing utility classes into your custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tell Tailwind which 'bucket' a set of custom styles belongs to.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Defines custom variables and themes for Tailwind v4.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Defines custom variants for Tailwind v4.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Imports a plugin for Tailwind v4.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Defines source paths for Tailwind v4.
